message:
Fix touch handler bugs in SwipeablePromptCard and remove dead code

- SwipeablePromptCard: Fix critical bug where touch handlers for
  double-tap/long-press were overriding swipe gesture handlers.
  Now both handlers are properly invoked on touch events.
- CharacterReveal: Remove unused totalChars variable (dead code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
